content: Maybe a little late, but I really enjoy the game. The problem is sometimes the game feel too rush even for a midbie, like chapter 1 last arc is quite a challenge,and you guys expect us to rush past that. No thanks, I rather lost the Thais skin than risk losing love for the game, even though mommy Thais is beautiful. Another things is why not covenant build in with awakeners window, i'm so lost with every time i have to go to team window to checks everyone. Besides that, nothing more. Thank you for making the game
